infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Opportunity OS uses your camera to scan business cards and organization logos for instant contact and lead capture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Opportunity OS accesses your photo library so you can upload business cards and organization images to your CRM.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Opportunity OS reads your contacts to help you quickly import and match leads to your CRM database.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Opportunity OS uses your location to find nearby organizations and improve business matching accuracy.

plugins.photosPermission: Opportunity OS accesses your photo library so you can upload business cards and organization images to your CRM.
plugins.cameraPermission: Opportunity OS uses your camera to scan business cards and organization logos for instant contact and lead capture.

plugins.contactsPermission: Opportunity OS reads your contacts to help you quickly import and match leads to your CRM database.
